---
format: 
  html:
    theme:
      light: flatly
      dark: darkly
    page-layout: full
    css: collab.css
    toc: false
---

::: page-header
# Lab Group
:::

## Intern


::::::::::::::: collaborator-grid
<!-- To add a new Candidates, copy one of these blocks -->

::: {.g-col .collaborator-card}
![](/images/intern_1.jpg)

**Sri Varsha Dodda**, IIT Indore

Time-series transformer models for predicting Green House Gas Emission

:::

:::::::::::::::



## UG Researchers


::::::::::::::: collaborator-grid
<!-- To add a new Candidates, copy one of these blocks -->

::: {.g-col .collaborator-card}
![](/images/Ug_1.jpg)

**Divansh**, IIT(ISM) Dhanbad

Vibration isolation with Metamaterials

:::

::: {.g-col .collaborator-card}
![](/images/Ug_2.jpg)

**Chaxu Patel**, IIT(ISM) Dhanbad

GenAI for Design
:::

::: {.g-col .collaborator-card}
![](/images/Ug_3.jpg)

**Harikesh Pratap Verma**, IIT(ISM) Dhanbad

Neural Control

:::


:::::::::::::::





## PhD. Candidate


::::::::::::::: collaborator-grid
<!-- To add a new Candidates, copy one of these blocks -->

::: {.g-col .collaborator-card}
![](/images/Phd_1.jpg)

**Gajavada Sanjeevkumar**, IIT(ISM) Dhanbad

Composites for flutter control

:::

:::::::::::::::
